name: Aureline Dental Clinic
heroHeadline: Private dental care designed to feel calm, refined, and meticulously personal.
subheadline: From routine hygiene to advanced restorative planning, we create thoughtful treatment journeys for patients who value discretion, clarity, and modern clinical standards.
aboutText: Dr. Maris leads Aureline with a patient-first approach grounded in prevention, precision, and clear communication. Every care plan is tailored to support long-term oral health while respecting comfort, schedule, and individual goals.

services.title: Preventive Dentistry
services.description: Routine examinations, hygiene visits, diagnostics, and personalized prevention plans that support long-term oral health.

services.title: Restorative Care
services.description: Thoughtful treatment for worn, damaged, or missing teeth with a focus on function, comfort, and natural-looking results.

services.title: Cosmetic Enhancements
services.description: Subtle smile improvements including whitening, bonding, and aesthetic refinement planned around facial balance and confidence.

services.title: Urgent Appointments
services.description: Prompt attention for dental discomfort, broken restorations, or sudden concerns when timely assessment matters.

reasons.title: Clear communication
reasons.copy: Every consultation is designed to explain findings, options, and next steps in language that feels straightforward and reassuring.

reasons.title: Comfortable environment
reasons.copy: Calm interiors, considerate scheduling, and a polished private setting help every visit feel more composed from arrival onward.

reasons.title: Tailored care
reasons.copy: Treatment recommendations are shaped around individual needs, priorities, and long-term oral health rather than a one-size-fits-all plan.

reasons.title: Appointment convenience
reasons.copy: Flexible scheduling and responsive communication make it easier to arrange care around busy professional and family routines.

testimonials.quote: A calm, beautifully run practice where every step felt explained and thoughtfully paced.
testimonials.author: Generic patient feedback

testimonials.quote: The clinic feels polished and discreet, and the team made a routine visit feel unusually comfortable.
testimonials.author: Generic patient feedback

testimonials.quote: I appreciated the clarity around options, pricing, and next steps. Everything felt professional and measured.
testimonials.author: Generic patient feedback

contactBlurb: We welcome private patients seeking a more personal dental experience. Contact the clinic to arrange a consultation or routine visit.
footerTagline: Private, modern dentistry with a calm patient experience.

home.doctorSectionTitle: Private dentistry guided by a personal, attentive approach.
home.doctorSectionBody: Our clinic combines calm surroundings with clear planning and thoughtful care, helping patients feel informed, comfortable, and genuinely looked after at every stage.
home.servicesTitle: Comprehensive dentistry for preventive, restorative, and aesthetic needs.
home.servicesCopy: Our service mix is intentionally focused: high-quality essentials, presented with clarity and delivered in a private practice setting.
home.whyChooseUsTitle: Why patients choose a more personal private clinic experience.
home.whyChooseUsCopy: The practice is designed to bring together modern dentistry, patient comfort, and clear communication in one refined setting.
home.testimonialsTitle: Placeholder testimonials for future approved patient feedback.
home.testimonialsCopy: These testimonials are intentionally generic placeholders, styled to show how the section can look on a premium private clinic homepage.
home.contactTitle: Contact the clinic to arrange an appointment or ask a practical question.

about.heroTitle: A private clinic shaped around calm communication and modern dental standards.
about.heroCopy: Aureline was designed for patients who want thoughtful care in a setting that feels composed, polished, and deeply professional.
about.philosophyTitle: Elegant surroundings matter, but trust is built through honesty, precision, and respect.
about.philosophyCopy: The practice experience is intentionally quiet and reassuring, while our clinical approach stays grounded in evidence-based care and transparent recommendations.

values.title: Personal attention
values.copy: Appointments are structured to allow careful discussion, clear explanations, and treatment planning that feels appropriately paced.

values.title: Clinical clarity
values.copy: We believe patients make better decisions when findings and options are presented in plain, honest language.

values.title: Long-term thinking
values.copy: Recommendations are guided by prevention, durability, and maintaining natural structure wherever possible.

about.expectTitle: A measured process from first consultation to ongoing care.
about.expectCopy: Whether a patient is visiting for a check-up or a larger treatment conversation, the goal is the same: clarity, comfort, and a plan that feels appropriate.
expectSteps: A welcoming first conversation about concerns, goals, and timing.
Clear findings and treatment options explained without pressure.
A practical care plan tailored to oral health priorities and lifestyle.

services.heroTitle: Comprehensive private care across prevention, restoration, and smile refinement.
services.heroCopy: Services are presented with clear reasoning and delivered with an emphasis on comfort, aesthetics, and long-term function.
services.processTitle: Treatment recommendations are built around diagnosis, priorities, and patient confidence.
services.processCopy: We aim to make care understandable. That means explaining what matters now, what can wait, and which options best fit the situation.

contact.heroTitle: Speak with the clinic to arrange appointments, discuss timing, or ask practical questions.
contact.heroCopy: This site is intentionally static for speed and simplicity, so appointment requests are handled by phone or email.
contact.reuseNote: For a future clinic rollout, this page can easily be reused by swapping the practice data, service list, and brand colors.
